title: Deterministic compact active emergence records
description: Follow-up from TASK-181 under claude-lab-mira lead: implement a deterministic MAP-side compaction command for active emergence records, then use it/core review to compact the remaining active records without local-model semantic drift. Scope excludes CommandCenterUI and external launcher work.
acceptance_criteria: A deterministic map_emergence command can dry-run and apply compact body-section conversion for named emergence records.
Remaining active emergence records are compacted with IDs, headers, statuses, checkbox decisions, evidence, and lifecycle meaning preserved.
The compaction command is idempotent for already compact records.
map_emergence validate/stale, librarian validate, validate_events --fail-on-new, validate_task_mirrors, and full MAP tests pass.
Report documents the command behavior, records changed, and why local-model direct rewrites were not used.
